news.headline: Russian Foreign Ministry, on the search for peace in Ukraine: We will be guided by concrete steps and actions.
Ingredion Inc. announced strong performance for Q4 and full year 2024. Headquarters: Westchester, Illinois.
news.summary: Westchester, Illinois, Feb. 06, 2025 - Ingredion Incorporated (NYSE: INGR), a global leader in food and beverage manufacturing solutions, released its financial report for the fourth quarter of 2024 and the full year of 2024 today. The company's performance for the year included significant numbers.

news.headline: Finovifi acquires Modern Banking Systems in Omaha, Nebraska, expanding market reach in AI fintech for community banks.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Finovifi, a top provider of AI-driven fintech solutions for community banks based in Birmingham, Alabama, revealed its acquisition of Modern Banking Systems (MBS) located in Omaha, Nebraska. MBS boasts more than 50 years of experience in core processing, enhancing Finovifi's capabilities within the industry. This acquisition marks a significant move for Finovifi as they continue to expand their services and reach in the fintech market.

news.headline: Vincent Ramelli becomes CEO of LodgIQ to lead global expansion as a proven leader in AI revenue solutions.
news.summary: An experienced entrepreneur and established leader has been chosen to spearhead strategic development and innovation at LodgIQ, based in Sunnyvale, California. The announcement was made on February 6, 2025. LodgIQ is known for offering user-friendly AI-driven revenue management tools tailored for the hospitality sector. The appointment aims to drive growth and improve innovation within the company.

news.headline: Initial jobless claims increase in early Feb, signaling more people losing jobs.
Russian Foreign Ministry: There are a lot of words about peace in Ukraine from the US but no clarity yet, Washington need to formulate a policy.
Intelligent Bio Solutions to see increased Q2 profitability, with $0.61M sales and 32.6% profit boost. Margin up to 38.5%.
news.summary: Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. (NASDAQ:INBS) recently revealed their preliminary fiscal second-quarter sales, totaling around $0.61 million, with a cumulative six-month sales figure resting at approximately $1.48 million. Projections indicate a 32.6% surge in gross profit, increasing from $0.43 million to $0.57 million over the six-month period, while the gross profit margin is slated to rise to 38.5% from the previous 27.7% by the end of December 31, 2024. These improvements are attributed to the company's strategic focus on augmenting recurring revenue generated from cartridge sales linked to the Intelligent Fingerprinting Drug Screening System. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Romanian fintech Pluridio expands globally, opening UK subsidiary at 100 Bishopsgate in London.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, a prominent provider of Capital Markets sales and trading software, Pluridio, unveiled its latest venture - the formation of a new branch called Pluridio UK Ltd. The subsidiary will be based in London, United Kingdom, with its headquarters located at the prestigious address of 18th & 19th Floors, 100 Bishopsgate. This strategic move signifies a significant step for Pluridio in expanding its global presence and enhancing its service offerings in the UK market.

news.summary: On February 6, 2025, in Houston and Frankfurt, a groundbreaking partnership was unveiled between Gulf Energy Information and DECHEMA. The organizers of the renowned ACHEMA trade show for the Process Industries revealed plans to launch an annual event that will become a must-attend for experts. This partnership marks a significant development in the industry and is set to attract a large number of participants from around the world.

news.headline: Arkstone partners with Neslab to improve healthcare in Peru by expanding access to infectious disease treatment.
news.summary: A significant development has taken place in Boca Raton, Florida, as of February 6, 2025. Arkstone Medical Solutions has embarked on a pioneering joint venture with Neslab, a top Peruvian medical technology firm, aimed at enhancing the delivery of precision-guided infectious disease treatment throughout Peru. This partnership is set to significantly impact the medical sector in Peru by improving access to advanced healthcare solutions.

news.headline: Ralph Lauren's stock surges thanks to successful holiday sales, exceeding expectations.
85% of auto executives plan to rely more on American suppliers in 2025 to strengthen supply chains.
news.summary: In North Bethesda, Md., as of Feb. 06, 2025, approximately 85% of automotive executives are intending to increase their dependence on North American suppliers this year, aiming to bolster their supply chains. This decision was revealed in the second edition of the "Driving Progress: The 2025 Automotive Manufacturing Survey."

news.headline: Productivity growth in the U.S. workforce decreased in the final months of the year.
Engenuity Systems & SkyCentrics team up to showcase IBB technology at 2025 AHR Expo with eViewIoT Pro™ & SkyBox.
news.summary: A live demonstration recently showcased the smooth integration of eViewIoT Pro™ and SkyBox in Orlando, Florida on Feb. 6, 2025. Engenuity Systems, renowned for smart building solutions, teamed up with SkyCentrics, a trailblazer in advanced IoT controls, for the event. The joint demonstration highlighted the seamless coordination between the two systems, emphasizing the synergy between their technologies. It served as a testament to the capabilities of these solutions and their potential impact on the industry.

news.headline: Bébé Foodie unveils customizable baby food app, offering guilt-free weaning journey, backed by experts.
news.summary: Created with the guidance of experts in pediatric care, Bébé Foodie is a comprehensive feeding program designed to assist parents in navigating key feeding issues. Developed in collaboration with pediatricians, allergists, nutritionists, and chefs, this program offers a tailored approach to address allergies and provide age-appropriate portion sizes. It also encourages diverse food choices and gives parents the flexibility to make informed decisions. This innovative program aims to empower parents with the tools they need on their child's feeding journey.

news.headline: Phound from Long Beach, CA, aims to restore trust in digital communication with innovative approach.
news.summary: In Long Beach, California, on February 6, 2025, Phound has emerged as a trailblazer in reestablishing faith in phone calls and messaging during a time when online communication can be uncertain. Through a unique strategy incorporating cutting-edge verification methods, personas, and contact systems, Phound aims to revolutionize the way individuals interact digitally.

news.headline: Materialise NV will report Q4 2024 earnings on Feb 20, 2025, with the release at 6:30 am ET/12:30 pm CET, followed by a conference call at 8:30 am ET/2:30 pm CET.
news.summary: Belgium-based Materialise NV (NASDAQ: MTLS) is set to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter concluded on December 31, 2024, on February 20, 2025. The report will be available at 6:30 a.m. ET/12:30 p.m. CET. Concurrently, senior executives will conduct a conference call to review the Q4 2024 results at 8:30 a.m. ET/2:30 p.m. CET on the same day. The company is a prominent provider of additive manufacturing software and advanced 3D printing services.

news.headline: Nuvve partners with ComEd and Resource Innovations to pilot V2G tech with electric school buses in Illinois for 4.3M customers.
news.summary: Nuvve Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: NVVE) has revealed a fresh pilot program with Resource Innovations, overseen by ComEd, in Chicago, San Diego, and Half Moon Bay, California. The project will investigate the advantages of bidirectional charging through electric school buses in ComEd's service region, serving over 4.3 million clients in northern Illinois. This program is set to continue until the conclusion of the fourth quarter of 2025 and aims to evaluate the effects on the environment, society, and the grid from incorporating vehicle-to-grid technology.

news.headline: ORIX Corporation USA invests in Piano with debt financing, alongside Series D equity fundraise led by Updata Partners.
news.summary: In New York, ORIX Corporation USA's Growth Capital division has finalized a debt financing arrangement for Piano Software, Inc., a prominent player in digital experience management, customer journey orchestration, and advanced analytics. Alongside Piano's Series D equity fundraise led by Updata Partners, the financing has been successfully closed. Updata Partners, a technology-focused growth equity firm based in Washington, D.C., spearheaded the equity raise. Piano's latest funding round marks a significant milestone for the company’s expansion plans, consolidating its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Sonos (Nasdaq: SONO) announces Q1 Fiscal 2025 results under new CEO Tom Conrad promising efficiency and growth.
news.summary: Sonos, Inc. (Nasdaq: SONO) announced its financial results for the First Quarter of Fiscal 2025 from Santa Barbara, Calif. Interim CEO, Tom Conrad, stated that the company has initiated significant organizational adjustments signaling the beginning of a phase focused on efficacy and expansion. He expressed optimism, highlighting the vast potential ahead. The team is currently dedicated to enhancing customer experiences and developing new Sonos products and advancements. The company is undergoing strategic changes to enhance growth prospects.

news.headline: Alight (NYSE: ALIT) to reveal Q4 & full year 2024 earnings on Feb 20, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET via webcast.
news.summary: Alight, Inc. (NYSE: ALIT), based in Chicago, revealed plans to disclose its earnings for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 before the markets open on Thursday, February 20, 2025. Following the release, company management will review the results in a webcast scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. The webcast, featuring a presentation of financial data, will be accessible to the public at Events & Presentations. The key details of the webcast are as follows: Date: Thursday, February 20, 2025Time: 8:30 a.m. ETInterested individuals can join the webcast at Events & Presentations and access a replay afterward.

news.headline: RingCentral (NYSE: RNG) to report Q4 2024 results on Feb 20, 2025, with a conference call at 2:00 PM PST (5:00 PM EST).
news.summary: RingCentral, Inc. (NYSE: RNG), a leading provider of AI-driven business communication solutions, is set to release its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 20, 2025, after the market closes. Following this, the company will conduct a conference call on the same day at 2:00 PM Pacific Time (5:00 PM Eastern Time) to analyze these results. Investors and stakeholders can participate in the conference call to gain insights into the financial performance.

news.headline: Taylor Swift's 'Football Effect' dips by 20% from 2024 as ad anticipation grows, per Zeta Global data.
news.summary: A recent study by Zeta Global reveals that Taylor Swift's 'Football Effect' has decreased by 20% compared to 2024. However, there has been a significant increase in anticipation for ads featuring the singer. This data was released in New York.

news.headline: VSee Health secures $2M contract renewal for neurocritical care expansion at hospital system, doubling beds.
news.summary: A prominent digital health services provider, VSee Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: VSEE), based in San Jose, California, has shared news of renewing a substantial contract with a leading Integrated Delivery Network (IDN) hospital system. The renewed contract, valued at $2 million, spans a period of two years. This expansion of the partnership is remarkable, as it involves doubling the coverage to now include a higher number of hospital beds. Additionally, the agreement incorporates VSee Health’s innovative self-driving robotic solutions specifically designed for neurocritical care. This development signifies a significant milestone in the ongoing collaboration between the two entities.

news.headline: Axena Health collaborates with Mayo Clinic to enhance female urinary incontinence care. Leva® System offers non-invasive treatment option.
news.summary: Axena Health, Inc., a medical device company in Newton, Massachusetts, has partnered with Mayo Clinic to incorporate educational materials on overactive bladder (OAB) into the Leva® Pelvic Health System. This system, known for its effectiveness in treating urinary incontinence (UI), offers a non-invasive solution for women. The collaboration aims to enhance the Leva System with Mayo Clinic's expertise in female pelvic health. This partnership signifies a strategic move by Axena Health to bolster its product with valuable insights from a renowned institution like Mayo Clinic.

news.headline: BlackSky Technology Inc. (NYSE: BKSY) to discuss Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 6, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. EST.
news.summary: A conference call by BlackSky Technology Inc. (NYSE: BKSY) is scheduled for Thursday, March 6, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. EST to talk about their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 and their future business prospects. The company will issue a press release with the financial results on the same day as the conference call. For the live or archived webcast of the call, interested individuals can visit the company’s investor relations website for access.

news.headline: Cizzle Brands Corp sponsors CWENCH All Canadian Volleyball Games. Brand CWENCH Hydration™ titles event on June 8, 2025.
news.summary: Toronto-based Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTC: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has revealed that CWENCH Hydration™, its primary brand, is now the title sponsor of the CWENCH All Canadian Volleyball Games. This event, considered Canada's leading yearly girls' volleyball event, is scheduled to happen at the Athlete Institute in Orangeville, Ontario on June 8, 2025. Launched in 2023, the All Canadian Volleyball Games has reached significant prominence.

news.headline: Cencora expands drug shortage mitigation program, offering nearly 200 medications, including oncology treatments, up by more than 350%.
news.summary: A global healthcare company, Cencora, headquartered in Conshohocken, Pa., has recently enhanced its sure supply program to address drug shortages in the healthcare industry. The program now offers nearly 200 medications, such as essential oncology treatments, marking a substantial growth of over 350% in available medications. This initiative aims to provide health systems with dependable access to critical drugs that are vulnerable to scarcity, supporting the stability of healthcare services.

news.headline: America’s Car-Mart, Inc. will release Q3 FY2025 financial results on March 6, 2025, with a conference call at 9:00 am ET.
news.summary: In Rogers, Arkansas, on February 6, 2025, America’s Car-Mart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRMT) revealed its plan to unveil the fiscal 2025 third quarter financial outcomes on Thursday, March 6, 2025, prior to market opening. The President and Chief Executive Officer, Doug Campbell, along with Chief Financial Officer Vickie Judy, will lead a conference call at 9:00 a.m ET to delve into the results.

news.headline: Summus selected for 2025 New York Digital Health 100 list by DHNY, recognizing innovative healthcare companies.
news.summary: Summus, a top clinical navigation and specialty care platform, has been honored with the DH100 award for its contributions to making New York a hub of healthcare innovation. This recognition was announced on February 6, 2025, marking a significant achievement for the company. The DH100 award highlights the most impactful companies in the digital health sector, and Summus has secured its place among them for its innovative approach. This recognition underscores Summus' dedication to advancing healthcare technology and its commitment to driving progress in the industry.

news.headline: Stagwell to discuss financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 on Feb. 27 in a 8:30 AM webcast. - NASDAQ: STGW
news.summary: In February 6, 2025, Stagwell (NASDAQ: STGW) announced that they will be releasing their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 27, 2025, before the market opens. The company is set to host a video webcast at 8:30 AM (ET) on the same day to discuss these results.

news.summary: On February 6, 2025, NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS), the leading U.S.-listed EV charging service provider in China, disclosed a significant growth in its charging interconnectivity operations. The Company unveiled plans for a substantial expansion by incorporating around 6.4 million additional...

news.headline: DarioHealth secures new Blue Cross Blue Shield agreement, enhancing financial growth and solidifying its presence in healthcare.
news.summary: DarioHealth has extended its network of payers through a recent partnership with Blue Cross Blue Shield. This agreement is expected to contribute to the company's revenue growth through recurring sources and solidify its presence in the rapidly expanding healthcare sector. Dario's digital health platform, powered by AI technology, remains a preferred choice among payers looking to enhance their services. This development highlights DarioHealth's strategic efforts, given that Blue Cross Blue Shield is a significant player in the insurance industry.

news.headline: King Street and Tor Investment Management provide $110M financing to Soul of Japan, on Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: In a joint statement released on February 6, 2025, King Street Capital Management and Tor Investment Management disclosed a significant financial arrangement. King Street, a prominent global alternative investment firm, collaborated with Tor, a major independent alternative credit manager in Asia, to secure a $110 million financing deal.

news.headline: Chan Zuckerberg Initiative launches Billion Cells Project to advance AI in biology with 10x Genomics and Ultima Genomics. Through single-cell dataset of one billion cells, new AI models will be created.
news.summary: Today, the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative (CZI) has unveiled a groundbreaking dataset comprising one billion single cells. This dataset is set to serve as a key resource in the development of new artificial intelligence models aimed at enhancing researchers' comprehension of cellular behavior and gene function. The initiative, based in Redwood City, California, is poised to significantly impact the field of cellular research by providing a vast and intricate dataset for training AI models. This milestone dataset represents a major leap forward in advancing scientific knowledge in this area.

news.headline: Unisys recognized as top leader in ISG's 2024 Advanced Analytics and AI Services Provider Lens, excelling in three key areas.
news.summary: In Blue Bell, Pennsylvania on February 6, 2025, Unisys, traded under the symbol "UIS" on the New York Stock Exchange, has achieved recognition as a world-leading company in the field of advanced analytics and AI services, according to ISG's 2024 Advanced Analytics and AI Services Provider Lens™. Unisys showcased outstanding capabilities across three important quadrant reports, particularly in Advanced Business Intelligence (BI).

news.headline: 10,240 students from 46 countries join Bloomberg's Global Trading Challenge, winners get free access to Bloomberg.com.
news.summary: In 2025, the top winners received a one-year complimentary subscription to Bloomberg.com. The Global Trading Challenge, an event hosted by Bloomberg on their Terminal platform for students, attracted a record-breaking 10,240 student participants from 46 different countries in 2024.

news.headline: Runway Growth Capital leads $75M loan facility in $120M financing for Piano, enabling platform expansion and market growth.
news.summary: Piano has secured funding to strengthen its platform capabilities, boost market expansion, and back strategic efforts for growth and innovative digital solutions to clients. The investment was made by Runway Growth Capital LLC from MENLO PARK, Calif. This move, announced on Feb. 6, 2025, underscores Piano's commitment to enhancing its services and increasing its market reach.

news.headline: PhaseV will showcase AI advancements in clinical development at biotech events. They use ML for precision & efficiency. (Words: 23)
news.summary: Demonstrations are set to showcase the successful implementation of machine learning and adaptive clinical trial design to improve precision and efficiency in drug development at an event in Boston on February 6, 2025. PhaseV, a leader in software and machine learning technologies for advanced clinical development, will be at the forefront of these presentations. Attendees will witness firsthand how these innovations are revolutionizing the industry, with significant advancements in leveraging data and technology to streamline processes. The event promises to provide insights into cutting-edge strategies that have shown great promise in enhancing drug development by harnessing the power of ML and adaptive design techniques.

news.headline: ePlus launches GRIT: Girls Re-Imagining Tomorrow® 2025 program to boost girls' interest in tech.
news.summary: A new STEM program, GRIT: Girls Re-Imagining Tomorrow®, has been initiated by ePlus inc. in Herndon, Va., on Feb. 6, 2025. The program aims to enhance girls' enthusiasm for technology careers. ePlus inc. (NASDAQ NGS: PLUS – news) unveiled this initiative, which is set to cover middle and high school students nationwide in the U.S. The program's primary goal is to inspire and engage young girls in STEM fields.
